raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/Rewind/Cor: Surfaced task ids (backend id or local_<rowid>) resolve through one shared identity helper, so mutating an unsynced task no longer no-ops or throws recordNotFound.
Pinned swift-format normalizes line layout without changing this source's runtime behavior.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/Rewind/UI/: Search-result rows load a downsampled ImageIO thumbnail instead of the full-resolution screenshot, so a long results list no longer retains full-size images behind a 120x80 view.
